system.flavor: You condense fire aether into boiling, molten rock, then fling it like a potent grenade.
system.effect:
Zone [X]: Create 1d3 single space zones of boiling magma in range. These could be created under characters. New zones created by this ability add to the total instead of replacing them.
• Magma zones are dangerous terrain
• Characters that start or end their turn in a magma zone gain slow.
• All damage against characters with at least one space inside a magma zone gains pierce.
